Class SavedObjectGraphOuterClass.SavedVariable

java.lang.Object
com.google.protobuf.AbstractMessageLite
com.google.protobuf.AbstractMessage
com.google.protobuf.GeneratedMessage
org.tensorflow.proto.SavedObjectGraphOuterClass.SavedVariable
All Implemented Interfaces:
Message, MessageLite, MessageLiteOrBuilder, MessageOrBuilder, Serializable, SavedObjectGraphOuterClass.SavedVariableOrBuilder
Enclosing class:
SavedObjectGraphOuterClass
public static final class SavedObjectGraphOuterClass.SavedVariable extends GeneratedMessage implements SavedObjectGraphOuterClass.SavedVariableOrBuilder
Represents a Variable that is initialized by loading the contents from the
checkpoint.
Protobuf type tensorflow.SavedVariable
See Also:

    • getExperimentalDistributedVariableComponentsList

      public List<SavedObjectGraphOuterClass.SavedVariable> getExperimentalDistributedVariableComponentsList()
      List of component variables for a distributed variable.

When this field is non-empty, the SavedVariable will be assumed
to be a distributed variable defined by the components listed here.

This is only supported by experimental loaders at the moment.
      repeated .tensorflow.SavedVariable experimental_distributed_variable_components = 8;
      Specified by:
      getExperimentalDistributedVariableComponentsList in interface SavedObjectGraphOuterClass.SavedVariableOrBuilder

      public List<? extends SavedObjectGraphOuterClass.SavedVariableOrBuilder> getExperimentalDistributedVariableComponentsOrBuilderList()
      List of component variables for a distributed variable.

When this field is non-empty, the SavedVariable will be assumed
to be a distributed variable defined by the components listed here.

This is only supported by experimental loaders at the moment.
      repeated .tensorflow.SavedVariable experimental_distributed_variable_components = 8;
      Specified by:
      getExperimentalDistributedVariableComponentsOrBuilderList in interface SavedObjectGraphOuterClass.SavedVariableOrBuilder
